use_cases: Displaying grouped content with header, title, description, and footer sections
Creating news article cards with title, description, and metadata
Building product or service listing cards
Form layout containers with consistent styling
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui-style Card component system providing reusable primitives for displaying grouped content. Includes Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, and CardFooter components with React.forwardRef support and Tailwind styling. Used as a content display container for news articles, product listings, or dashboard widgets.
